parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Replication Method
parameters.description: Choose between using a Template Table where each row will create a replicant or using the Number of Replicants parameter below to set how many replications to make.

parameters.name: numreplicants
parameters.label: Number of Replicants
parameters.description: Set number of replicants when using Replication Method = By Number above.

parameters.name: template
parameters.label: Template DAT Table
parameters.description: to the table that will drive the replicating.

parameters.name: namefromtable
parameters.label: Name from Table
parameters.description: How the node names will be generated.

parameters.name: ignorefirstrow
parameters.label: Ignore First Row
parameters.description: Do not create a node for the first row.

parameters.name: colname
parameters.label: Column Name
parameters.description: Name at the top of the column.

parameters.name: colindex
parameters.label: Column Index
parameters.description: Column number, starting from 0.

parameters.name: opprefix
parameters.label: Operator Prefix
parameters.description: Add this prefix to all nodes.

parameters.name: master
parameters.label: Master Operator
parameters.description: Which node or component to replicate.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.label: Destination
parameters.description: Where to put the replicant nodes. If the location is , it puts the nodes inside the parent, which is actually alongside the component. If you put , it will put it inside itself, that is, inside the co

parameters.name: domaxops
parameters.label: Maximum Operators
parameters.description: Enable the parameter below to set a maximum number of allowed replicants.

parameters.name: maxops
parameters.label: Maximum Operators
parameters.description: Max number of nodes replicated.

parameters.name: tscript
parameters.label: Script
parameters.description: only (use callback in python): For every replicant, you can run a script to customize it relative to the master, such as setting the Display or Clone parameters, or a Render flag. runs the script comm

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: to a containing callbacks for each event received.  See for usage.

parameters.name: layout
parameters.label: Layout
parameters.description: How to lay out the new nodes - all in one place (Off), horizontally, vertically, or in a grid.

parameters.name: doincremental
parameters.label: Incremental Update
parameters.description: Enables the parameter below for incremental creation of replicants.

parameters.name: increment
parameters.label: Incremental Update
parameters.description: Staggers the replication of operators to avoid large frame drops when creating replicants. It will create the specified number of replicants per frame at most, by default 1 per frame, if Incremental U

parameters.name: recreateall
parameters.label: Recreate All Operators
parameters.description: Deletes all nodes it has created, then re-creates them using the template and its current parameters.

parameters.name: recreatemissing
parameters.label: Recreate Missing Operators
parameters.description: Re-creates missing operators from the template table but does not delete and re-create already existing replicants.

parameters.name: reinitextensions
parameters.label: Re-Init Extensions
parameters.description: Recompile all extension objects. Normally extension objects are compiled only when they are referenced and their definitions have changed.

parameters.name: initextonstart
parameters.label: Init Extensions On Start
parameters.description: Perform a Re-Init automatically when TouchDEsigner Starts

parameters.name: ext
parameters.label: Extension
parameters.description: Sequence of info for creating extensions on this component

parameters.name: ext0object
parameters.label: Object
parameters.description: A number of class instances that can be attached to the component.

parameters.name: ext0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Optional name to search by, instead of the instance class name.

parameters.name: ext0promote
parameters.label: Promote
parameters.description: Controls whether or not the extensions are visible directly at the component level, or must be accessed through the member.  Example: vs

parameters.name: parentshortcut
parameters.label: Parent Shortcut
parameters.description: Specifies a name you can use anywhere inside the component as the path to that component. See .

parameters.name: opshortcut
parameters.label: Global OP Shortcut
parameters.description: Specifies a name you can use anywhere at all as the path to that component. See .

parameters.name: iop
parameters.label: Internal OP
parameters.description: Sequence header for internal operators.

parameters.name: iop0shortcut
parameters.label: Shortcut
parameters.description: Specifies a name you can use anywhere inside the component as a path to "Internal " below. See .

parameters.name: iop0op
parameters.label: OP
parameters.description: The path to the Internal OP inside this component. See .

parameters.name: opviewer
parameters.label: Operator Viewer
parameters.description: Select which operator's node viewer to use when the Node View parameter above is set to Operator .

parameters.name: enablecloning
parameters.label: Enable Cloning
parameters.description: Control if the OP should be actively cloneing. Turning this off causes this node to stop cloning it's 'Clone Master'.

parameters.name: enablecloningpulse
parameters.label: Enable Cloning Pulse
parameters.description: Instantaneously clone the contents.

parameters.name: clone
parameters.label: Clone Master
parameters.description: to a component used as the Master .

parameters.name: loadondemand
parameters.label: Load on Demand
parameters.description: Loads the component into memory only when required. Good to use for components that are not always used in the project.

parameters.name: enableexternaltox
parameters.label: Enable External .tox
parameters.description: When on (default), the external file will be loaded when the starts and the contents of the will match that of the external . This can be turned off to avoid loading from the referenced external on st

parameters.name: enableexternaltoxpulse
parameters.label: Enable External .tox Pulse
parameters.description: This button will re-load from the external file (if present).

parameters.name: externaltox
parameters.label: External .tox Path

parameters.name: relpath
parameters.label: Relative File Path Behavior
parameters.description: Set whether the child file paths within this are relative to the itself or the , or inherit from parent.

parameters.name: repsuffixstart
parameters.label: Repsuffixstart
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: layoutorigin2
parameters.label: Layoutorigin2
parameters.description: Where to lay out the new nodes, giving the XY location of the top-left node's bottom-left corner.
